name: ai-to-ai-holding-customs
description: Thai Customs Intelligence MCP Server — 14 AI engines. HS classification, 13 FTA agreements, 36 OGA agencies, Halal (21 countries), Landed Cost (11 Incoterms), Price Benchmark, Freight Audit, What-If Optimizer, Customs Audit Risk, CBAM Carbon, ASEAN expansion (6 countries). SHA-256 evidence chain.

tools.name: classify_hs_code
tools.description: Classify a product into Thai Customs HS Code. Returns HS code, MFN duty rate, best FTA rate (across 13 agreements), OGA permit requirements, Halal status (21 countries), confidence score, and SHA-256 evidence chain. Accepts Thai or English product descriptions — or both mixed. Output is decision-support only, not a binding classification.

product_description.description: Product description in Thai, English, or mixed. Examples: 'hydraulic excavator', 'มือถือ iPhone', 'frozen shrimp vannamei'

origin_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of origin (e.g. CN, US, JP, TH)

destination_country.description: Destination country for Halal check (ISO alpha-2). Defaults to TH.

value_usd.description: CIF value in USD (optional, used for duty calculation)

tools.name: check_fta_rate
tools.description: Look up best preferential import duty rate under FTA agreements between Thailand and origin country. Covers all 13 agreements: RCEP, AFTA, ACFTA, AJCEP, AKFTA, AANZFTA, AIFTA, TAFTA, TNZCEP, JTEPA, TCFTA, TPFTA, MFN. Returns best available rate and the agreement it comes from.

tools.name: check_oga_compliance
tools.description: Check if a product requires Other Government Agency (OGA) permits before import into Thailand. Returns list of required agencies: FDA (อย.), กรมประมง, กรมปศุสัตว์, มอก./TISI, กรมวิชาการเกษตร, and others.

product_description.description: Product description for additional context (Thai or English)

tools.name: check_halal_status
tools.description: Check Halal certification requirements for a product across 21 countries. Returns halal_required flag, risk level, and per-country requirements.

destination_country.description: ISO alpha-2 country code. If omitted, checks all 21 countries.

tools.name: sandbox_classify
tools.description: Free trial — no API key required. Rate limited to 20 req/min. Returns full classification result including HS code, FTA rates, OGA, and Halal flags.

product_description.description: Product description in Thai, English, or mixed

tools.name: calculate_landed_cost
tools.description: Calculate total Landed Cost with 11 Incoterms. Returns product value + freight + insurance + duty + VAT + local charges breakdown.
